subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bound with chains and shackles in the path of the Most Glorious Beauty! That which was written and recorded hath been perused and noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر سلاسل و اغلال در سبیل جمال ابهی آنچه مرقوم و مسطور بود متلو و ملحوظ
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
